description: Sector overlay for Ghana upstream petroleum, downstream petroleum, local content, licensing, HSE, metering, distribution, and petroleum operations documentation.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Oil and Gas. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Petroleum Commission Act, 2011 (Act 821) and Petroleum Commission mandate
Petroleum (Local Content and Local Participation) Regulations, 2013 (L.I. 2204)

rules.title: Petroleum Commission authorization, contract, or upstream regulatory evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Petroleum Commission registration, approval, permit, petroleum agreement, upstream operator status, or regulatory filing evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Local content and local participation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for local content plan, local participation, Ghanaian company preference, local office, training, succession, or procurement forecasts.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Petroleum (Local Content and Local Participation) Regulations, 2013 (L.I. 2204)

rules.title: Downstream NPA licence, permit, or product-distribution evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for NPA licence, downstream petroleum authorization, bulk distribution, retail, storage, transport, or petroleum product marketing controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: HSE, environmental, emergency, or incident reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for health, safety, environment, incident reporting, emergency response, spill, waste, or environmental management evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
